texts.label: text
texts.orig: To secure a booking, a 30% deposit must be paid within 10 days, and upon receipt of the deposit, a c rmation voucher will be issued. For credit facilities or unique contracts, a separate application is required. Full payment must be completed prior to the clients' arrival, and failure to make payment within one week of the accommodation date may result in the loss of the booking.
texts.text: To secure a booking, a 30% deposit must be paid within 10 days, and upon receipt of the deposit, a c rmation voucher will be issued. For credit facilities or unique contracts, a separate application is required. Full payment must be completed prior to the clients' arrival, and failure to make payment within one week of the accommodation date may result in the loss of the booking.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In the event of a booking postponement, your payment can be held for a future booking without penalty fees. However, if you cancel your booking more than 8 weeks before your arrival, the 30% deposit will be forfeited. If you cancel within 4-6 weeks of your travel, the cancellation charges will amount to 60% of the total cost of your safari. Cancellation within 3 weeks of the travel date will result in being charged the full amount of the safari. If you fail to travel or join your safari after it has started, or if you leave before its completion, no refund will be issued.
texts.text: In the event of a booking postponement, your payment can be held for a future booking without penalty fees. However, if you cancel your booking more than 8 weeks before your arrival, the 30% deposit will be forfeited. If you cancel within 4-6 weeks of your travel, the cancellation charges will amount to 60% of the total cost of your safari. Cancellation within 3 weeks of the travel date will result in being charged the full amount of the safari. If you fail to travel or join your safari after it has started, or if you leave before its completion, no refund will be issued.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Below 5 years - Stay free of charge.
texts.text: Below 5 years - Stay free of charge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Over 12 years will be charged an adult rate.
texts.text: Over 12 years will be charged an adult rate.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: (Main Camp family tent is based on 4 Pax sharing in a twin/double, the adult sharing rate to apply to all.  Any additional person will be charged as an adult or child rate respectively.)
texts.text: (Main Camp family tent is based on 4 Pax sharing in a twin/double, the adult sharing rate to apply to all.  Any additional person will be charged as an adult or child rate respectively.)

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Toto Family tent is based on 2 adults and 2 children sharing below 12 years.
texts.text: Toto Family tent is based on 2 adults and 2 children sharing below 12 years.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: *All Rates are subject to change without any prior notice *Park fees are valid for 12 hours as per the Narok County Government
texts.text: *All Rates are subject to change without any prior notice *Park fees are valid for 12 hours as per the Narok County Government
